name: NFA Transfer Tax Exemption

eligibility.description: Applies to transfers to the U.S. government, transfers between qualified importers/manufacturers/dealers, or transfers of unserviceable firearms as curios.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts the transfer of firearms from the $200 transfer tax when transferred to the U.S. government, between qualified SOT holders, or as unserviceable curios.
